checks.name: sample_size
checks.detail: The current model benchmark must cover enough forward paper observations before any live-readiness claim.

checks.name: beats_no_trade_baseline
checks.required: model final equity > no-trade baseline final equity
checks.detail: A losing active model should not advance toward live trading while a no-trade baseline preserves capital better.

checks.name: non_negative_mark_pnl
checks.required: mark P&L >= 0 on forward paper benchmark
checks.detail: Survival state alone is insufficient; the mark-to-market path must not be loss-making.

checks.name: no_open_positions
checks.detail: Unsettled open exposure prevents treating the run as a completed performance sample.

checks.name: official_forward_resolutions
checks.required: at least one official closed forward resolution loaded into replay
checks.detail: Forward paper settlement must be proven with official closed markets, not only near-binary open markets.

checks.name: closed_trade_count
checks.detail: A live gate needs enough timestamp-valid closed trades to estimate realized P&L, win rate, and drawdown.

checks.name: max_drawdown_under_limit
checks.detail: Final equity can hide path risk; readiness must include the worst observed equity drawdown.

checks.name: not_market_echo
checks.detail: A model that mostly echoes the market midpoint is not providing independent signal.

checks.name: oracle_smoke_is_accounting_only
checks.required: oracle smoke exists and model identity does not contain oracle
checks.detail: Oracle smoke uses resolved outcomes and lookahead. It validates settlement plumbing only.

next_actions: Continue paper logging and official resolution replay until closed forward trades exist.
Do not route private keys, signing, live order placement, or asset movement through this scaffold.
Only compare model variants after each produces timestamp-valid forecasts on the same forward rows.
note: Readiness gate only. No orders were placed, signed, or submitted.
